name: Lijiang Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Lijiang coverage with a focus on old-town pacing, highland route openings, and when Yunnan works better by beginning gently before it climbs.
fullBio: The Lijiang Editorial Desk maintains guides and planning coverage related to Lijiang. Its focus is helping readers judge when Lijiang should act as Yunnan's opening base, how the city balances old-town beauty with tourism performance, and how Jade Dragon Snow Mountain, Naxi culture, and plateau pacing shape the wider branch toward Shangri-La and the highlands.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for route fit, altitude practicality, seasonal realism, and whether the advice still matches current Lijiang planning conditions and broader Yunnan travel patterns.
seoTitle: Lijiang Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Lijiang guides and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
